name: Liturgy of the Hours
tagline: Pray the ancient prayer of the Church on your G2.
description: Liturgy of the Hours prayer reader for Even G2 glasses. Browse and read the Divine Office hour by hour with clean, formatted text. Pulls daily prayers from divineoffice.org.
author: Will Grannis

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Fetches daily prayer texts from divineoffice.org via loth.grannis.xyz API
